ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget_currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the movie budget */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the movie */,
  "production_country" TEXT /* Production country of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage URL of the movie */,
  "spoken_languages" TEXT /* Spoken languages in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_production_country FOREIGN KEY ("production_country") REFERENCES production_countries ("production_country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_spoken_languages FOREIGN KEY ("spoken_languages") REFERENCES spoken_languages ("spoken_language_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_production_company FOREIGN KEY ("production_company") REFERENCES production_companies ("production_company_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for financial records */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie this financial record belongs to */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "budget_adj" REAL /* Adjusted budget for inflation */,
  "revenue_adj" REAL /* Adjusted revenue for inflation */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made by the movie */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for ratings records */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie this rating record belongs to */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g. IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  "weighted_average" REAL /* Weighted average rating of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_years" (
  "release_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the release year record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie this release year record belongs to */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "release_quarter" TEXT /* Quarter in which the movie was released (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_years_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_types" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the movie genre record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie this genre record belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre this record belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genre_types ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "production_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "production_company_address" TEXT /* Address of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_countries" (
  "production_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production country */,
  "production_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the production country */,
  "production_country_code" TEXT /* Code of the production country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoken_languages" (
  "spoken_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spoken language */,
  "spoken_language_name" TEXT /* Name of the spoken language */,
  "spoken_language_code" TEXT /* Code of the spoken language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spoken_language_id")
)
